name: Modernist Tabouli with Herb Oil & Precision Texture
description: A refined tabouli showcasing precision-cut herbs, vacuum-hydrated bulgur, clarified lemon, and vibrant herb oil for a clean, modern presentation.
keywords: tabouli, tabbouleh, modernist, vegetarian, herbs, fine dining

winePairings.name: Sancerre
winePairings.notes: Crisp acidity complements lemon and herbs.

winePairings.name: Albari�o
winePairings.notes: Bright citrus and minerality enhance freshness.

steps.instruction: Weigh bulgur and water at a 1:1 ratio. Vacuum seal with a pinch of salt and allow to hydrate for 30�40 minutes.
Clarify the lemon juice by blending briefly and passing through a fine chinois or superbag.
steps.note: for ultra clarity, centrifuge if available

steps.instruction: Blanch a small portion of parsley for 10 seconds, shock in ice, then blend with olive oil until vibrant green.
Finely chiffonade parsley and mint, then cross-cut gently.
Deseed tomatoes completely and dice into uniform small cubes.
Rinse sliced shallots briefly in cold water and dry.
Combine bulgur, herbs, tomatoes, shallots, and scallions gently by hand.
Add clarified lemon juice, lemon zest, and salt. Mix lightly.
Fold in olive oil gently until evenly coated.
Optional: briefly place mixture under light vacuum to integrate flavors.
Plate using a ring mold to form a tight cylinder. Finish with herb oil, mint tips, and pomegranate seeds.
